methods.void append(int key, long value): Puts a key/value pair into the array, optimizing for the case where the key is greater than all existing keys in the array.
methods.void clear(): Removes all key-value mappings from this SparseLongArray.
methods.SparseLongArray clone(): Creates and returns a copy of this object.
methods.void delete(int key): Removes the mapping from the specified key, if there was any.
methods.long get(int key): Gets the long mapped from the specified key, or 0 if no such mapping has been made.
methods.long get(int key, long valueIfKeyNotFoun: Gets the long mapped from the specified key, or the specified value if no such mapping has been made.
methods.int indexOfKey(int key): Returns the index for which keyAt(int) would return the specified key, or a negative number if the specified key is not mapped.
methods.int indexOfValue(long value): Returns an index for which valueAt(int) would return the specified key, or a negative number if no keys map to the specified value.
methods.int keyAt(int index): Given an index in the range 0...size()-1, returns the key from the indexth key-value mapping that this SparseLongArray stores.
methods.void put(int key, long value): Adds a mapping from the specified key to the specified value, replacing the previous mapping from the specified key if there was one.
methods.void removeAt(int index): Removes the mapping at the given index.
methods.int size(): Returns the number of key-value mappings that this SparseLongArray currently stores.
methods.String toString(): Returns a string representation of the object. This implementation composes a string by iterating over its mappings.
methods.long valueAt(int index): Given an index in the range 0...size()-1, returns the value from the indexth key-value mapping that this SparseLongArray stores.
